parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'google/gemini-2.0-flash-exp:free', temperature: 0.1, messages: [ { role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'text', text: 'You are a receipt / invoice OCR and data extractor. Read this receipt image and return ONLY a JSON object — no prose, no markdown fences.

Schema:
{
  "transaction_type": "expense",
  "amount": number (grand total, no thousand separators),
  "currency": string (default "IDR"),
  "transaction_date": string (ISO YYYY-MM-DD if visible, else null),
  "merchant_name": string | null,
  "item_name": string | null (short summary of items),
  "category": one of ["Groceries","Dining","Transportation","Utilities","Entertainment","Shopping","Health","Other"],
  "payment_method": string | null,
  "invoice_number": string | null,
  "location": string | null,
  "tax_amount": number | null,
  "discount_amount": number | null,
  "notes": string | null,
  "confidence_score": number 0..1
}

Rules:
- amount = grand total after tax/discount
- If you cannot read a field, set it to null
- Never return markdown, never return prose
- Return ONLY the JSON.' }, { type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: $json.data_url } } ] } ] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, transaction_id: ($json.id || null), parsed: $('Build Payload').item.json }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, error: $json._error, raw: $json.raw || null }) }}
